name: design-toolkit
description: Design-fidelity toolkit unifying two design-provider adapters: design-faithful (the claude-design / DesignSync provider) and figma-faithful (the figma / Figma-MCP provider). Ships each provider's translation + spec skills (design-faithful, design-faithful-spec, figma-faithful, figma-faithful-spec) and its fidelity reviewer agent. The active provider is selected by config (the design-provider axis).
